title: quercus shangxiensis
intro: Quercus shangxiensis, also known as the Shangxi red oak, is a deciduous tree species that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae). The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its leaves, which contain flavonoids and phenolic acids, and are traditionally used to treat fever, rheumatism, and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Quercus shangxiensis include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. The leaves can be prepared as a tea or infused in hot water to make a herbal decoction, which is often used in traditional Chinese medicine to promote overall health and well-being.
